text: Hello, I'm calling from the Directorate of Revenue Intelligence. A parcel with your name on it has been seized at the airport, containing undeclared goods. We need to discuss this further on a secure video call.

We've been monitoring your online activities, and it appears your IP address was used to upload defamatory content. I'm calling from the National Cybercrime Reporting Portal. Let's discuss this on a video call.
Hello, I'm calling from the Department of Telecommunications. There's been a report of SIM card misuse under your name. To avoid service disruption, please verify your identity on this video call.
I'm calling from the Income Tax Department. Our records show discrepancies in your tax returns. To avoid penalties, please join a video call to clarify these discrepancies.
I'm an investigator from the Enforcement Directorate. We're looking into a money laundering case that involves your bank account. To clear your name, please cooperate with us on a video call.
Hello, I'm calling from the Department of Posts. A courier package containing prohibited items was sent under your name. To avoid legal consequences, please verify the details on a video call.
This is an officer from the Narcotics Control Bureau. We've intercepted a parcel with drugs sent to your address. To avoid arrest, please cooperate with our investigation on a video call.
Hello, this is Officer Rao from the State CID. We've found your personal details linked to a recent online scam. To protect your identity and assist our investigation, please join this video call.
